title: Advanced Generators
body:
### Features

* Free Form Multi Block Modular Power Generators
* Produce FE/RF
* Run on various liquid fuel types or steam
* Heat Exchanger can transfer heat between various substances
* Syngas Producer makes fluid fuel from solid ones

### Requirements

Requires [BDLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bdlib) and [Scalable Cats Force](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalable-cats-force).


### Open Source

The mod is licensed under the [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT), the source code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/bdew-minecraft/generators).

Yes this means you have permission to add it to any public or private mod pack.
